mission.title: qdrant: Per-collection metrics for Prometheus
mission.description: Per-collection metrics for Prometheus. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current qdrant deployment
steps.description:
Verify your qdrant version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n qdrant -l app.kubernetes.io/name=qdrant
helm list -n qdrant 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working qdrant installation.

steps.title: Review qdrant configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant qdrant configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n qdrant -l app.kubernetes.io/name=qdrant
kubectl get configmap -n qdrant -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=qdrant
```
Currently, all metrics in `/metrics` are global, meaning that it’s impossible to see differences per collection.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Per-collection metrics for Prometheus
steps.description:
Currently, the `/metrics` collection is strongly coupled with the `/telemetry` collection. The `/metrics` endpoint is just a filtered-out telemetry metrics. (filtering happens in `MetricsProvider::add_metrics` trait method).
Does the `/telemetry` endpoint need to be updated as well?

I see multiple
```yaml
grpc_responses_min_duration_seconds{endpoint="/qdrant.Points/Upsert"} 0.000046
grpc_responses_min_duration_seconds{endpoint="/qdrant.Points/Upsert",collection="my-collection"} 0.000049
grpc_responses_min_duration_seconds{endpoint="/qdrant.Points/Upsert",collection="my-collection-2"} 0.000046
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n qdrant -l app.kubernetes.io/name=qdrant
kubectl get events -n qdrant --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Per-collection metrics for Prometheus" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Currently, the `/metrics` collection is strongly coupled with the `/telemetry` collection. The `/metrics` endpoint is just a filtered-out telemetry metrics. (filtering happens in `MetricsProvider::add_metrics` trait method).
Does the `/telemetry` endpoint need to be updated as well?

I see multiple options to implement this.
1. Decouple metrics and telemetry collection.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with qdrant installed or the issue environment reproducible.
